data.name: Aurora Protocol
data.detailed_description:
Step into the shoes of a character who has just moved into the house of a family friend, who also happens to be the renowned owner of Artimus Corp, a multi-trillion-dollar conglomerate that dominates the tech industry. The owner, Blake, had always seen you as a potential protégée, but no one has been able to contact him for weeks.

As the mystery surrounding his disappearance deepens, you begin to notice odd behaviors in the androids that Artimus Corp produces. A stranger knocks on your door just before things spiral out of control, and even your dreams are no longer safe.

Unravel the mystery of your past and forge your future in this cyberpunk-style futuristic game, where the decisions you make impact your relationships with each character… including a possible harem.
Aurora Protocol is a choice-driven adult Visual Novel featuring:

  • Over 4,000 4k static images and more than 15,300 4k animation renders

  • 5-10 hours of gameplay

  • Heavily story driven with a cyberpunk style world complete with mystery and sci-fi themes

  • Over 100 songs

  • Plenty of lewd scenes with various girls

  • Over 300 sound effects

    Can you trust your memories?
    Can you trust your dreams?
    Can you keep those around you safe?
    Build your harem

    Or just focus on your preferred crush(s)
    Choices matter and the outcome is up to you, discover what awaits you in Aurora Protocol!





    Aurora Protocol features cutting-edge Genesis 9 characters rendered in the DAZ engine at full quality. Most characters use 8K texture maps, and each has been individually mapped in Blender for smooth, high-fidelity animation.

    Experience Aurora Protocol in ultra-HD

data.short_description: Move in with a family friend, the missing owner of Artimus Corp, a tech mega-conglomerate. As androids act strangely and your dreams unravel, uncover the truth of your past in this adult cyberpunk visual novel where choices shape relationships and a growing harem.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 日文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 土耳其文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or newer
  • 處理器: 64-bit Intel/AMD compatible CPU running at 2.0 GHz or faster
  • 記憶體: 8 GB RAM MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any graphics card that supports OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any modern sound card recognized by the OS
  • VR 支援: n/a
  • 備註: n/a
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or newer
  • 處理器: 64-bit Intel/AMD compatible CPU running at 2.0 GHz or faster
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any graphics card that supports OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any modern sound card recognized by the OS
  • VR 支援: n/a
  • 備註: n/a

data.legal_notice:
© 2026 Astghik Games. All rights reserved.

This game includes licensed music and royalty-free music used in accordance with their respective licenses. Full music credits are provided in the in-game “About” section.

The game utilizes character models and assets from DAZ 3D under a limited license. All rendered images, original assets, writing, and game code (excluding the Ren’Py engine and its components) are original works and are the property of Astghik Games.
